sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation found in provided sources

special_mechanics.name: Spin Dash
special_mechanics.description: Special attack that allows character to defeat badniks and gain a speed boost

special_mechanics.name: Tails Flight
special_mechanics.description: Tails can fly for a short duration by spinning his twin tails like a helicopter rotor

special_mechanics.name: Swimming
special_mechanics.description: Tails can swim underwater; Sonic cannot

special_mechanics.name: Shield Power-ups
special_mechanics.description: Various shields available: underwater breathing shield, fire resistance shield, ring attraction shield

special_mechanics.name: Super Sonic Transformation
special_mechanics.description: Collecting all 7 Chaos Emeralds as Sonic grants invincibility transformation

tier_notes: Tier 1 classification based on empirical/qualitative documentation. No numerical physics parameters (acceleration values, gravity constants, jump force, sub-pixel precision) are documented in the provided sources. Documentation focuses on gameplay mechanics and features rather than underlying physics calculations.
sources_used: wikipedia - Sonic the Hedgehog 3 Gameplay section
